name: Open Border Spinner
css: .darma-loader-open-border-spinner{display:inline-block;width:58px;height:58px;border-radius:16px;border:5px solid color-mix(in srgb,var(--loader-color,#0ea5e9) 18%,transparent);border-top-color:var(--loader-color,#0ea5e9);border-right-color:var(--loader-secondary-color,#bae6fd);animation:darma-loader-open-border-spinner-turn var(--loader-speed,.95s) cubic-bezier(.65,0,.35,1) infinite}@keyframes darma-loader-open-border-spinner-turn{0%{transform:rotate(0);border-radius:16px}50%{transform:rotate(180deg);border-radius:50%}100%{transform:rotate(360deg);border-radius:16px}}

source.name: Whirl inspired pattern
source.author: Jhey Tompkins / open-source CSS loader community
